name: @cawilliamhc/practice-financial-core
description: Shared, framework-agnostic financial modeling engine for practice-studio-desktop and client-studio-desktop: schedule-block metrics, expense totals, tax/retirement/take-home projections, and multi-year fee-increase modeling. Published to npm and consumed as a normal dependency by both apps — bump the version here, build, and publish to ship a change to both.
